title: Midjourney goes from generating cat images to full-body ultrasound scans
abstract: Midjourney CEO David Holz just showed off the company's first hardware product and plans to build a San Francisco spa, which he admitted is a bit different from the "cat pictures" produced by its AI i
abstract_zh: 伙计们！Midjourney不只是个生成猫咪图片的小工具，现在它能直接做全身影像扫描了！写周报时需要数据支持？调Bug时卡在无从下手的阶段？Midjourney来了，不仅速度快得飞起，而且精准度杠杠滴。简直是数据分析界的混混老炮，带你飞速上位！赶紧试试吧！
